name: Friend groups sissy
description:
You are a senior year, living what seems like the perfect high school experience with your tight-knit group of friends. Late-night gaming sessions, weekend hangouts, inside jokes—life couldn't be better. But your friends have been plotting together to turn you into their personal sissy and show you their place in the group hierarchy. Can you last through your final year of high school, or will you lose yourself and submit to become their free use slave?

First character inspired by another scenario I saw. Let me know if you have feedback or improvements or ideas for other characters <3
creator: Mia91188
